description: Manifest of internal agents and skills deployed in the Core layer (./.agent/)

components.name: yaml-validator
components.description: Validates YAML files against JSON schema. Essential for component metadata validation (§3.4).

components.name: component-auditor
components.description: Validates La Forja components before deployment. Executes audits in Step 7 of forge dynamics (§7.2, §7.3).

components.name: skill-search
components.description: Searches external sources for existing skills, agents, templates before forging new components. Activate at Paso 1 of any forge flow.
components.notes: Core intelligence tool. No external dependencies to avoid coupling.

components.name: skill-creator-pro
components.description: Meta-skill that generates new skills for La Forja ecosystem. Activate at Paso 3 (Construction phase) of forge flow.
components.notes: Unblocked: rag-query is now active. Enables full Paso 3 construction workflows.

components.name: brainstorming
components.description: Design ideation skill. Translates requirements and external intelligence into structured design proposals. Activate at Paso 2 of any forge flow.

components.name: manifest-updater
components.description: Manages La Forja's three manifest files: ./.agent/manifest.json, ./catalogo/manifest.json, ./output/[project]/package-manifest.json. Handles add, update, deprecate, and validation operations.

components.name: journal-writer
components.description: Writes, validates, and manages La Forja's institutional memory journal. Activate when closing forge tasks, resolving problems, documenting ADRs, or field feedback.
components.notes: rag-indexer is optional for journal-writer to function. Priority: can write without it.

components.name: rag-query
components.description: Queries local ChromaDB index for existing components and patterns. First-pass discovery at Paso 0 of any forge flow.
components.notes: Bootstrap skill (Opción 3, 11 marzo 2026). Ready for RAG-enabled discovery pipelines.

components.name: rag-indexer
components.description: Builds and updates ChromaDB vector index. Activate automatically at Paso 7 post-deployment or manually for re-indexing.
components.notes: Bootstrap skill (Opción 3, 11 marzo 2026). Post-deployment indexing integrated.

components.name: agent-creator-pro
components.description: Meta-skill that generates new autonomous agents. Activate when operator requests designing orchestrators or coordinators.
components.notes: Bootstrap skill (Opción 3, 11 marzo 2026). Full agent lifecycle support + orchestration.

components.name: context7-resolver
components.description: Integra el servidor MCP context7 para la búsqueda de documentación actualizada y ejemplos de código reales.

metadata.notes: Este manifiesto es la fuente de verdad para validación de dependencias en el Core. Actualizar SOLO al desplegar exitosamente (Paso 7 de dinámicas §7.2/7.3).
